visual_families.lighting: soft natural daylight with gentle highlights
visual_families.palette: chalky whites, oat tones, pale woods, restrained contrast

visual_families.mood: warm, tactile, layered and inviting styling
visual_families.lighting: late-morning daylight with warm reflected light
visual_families.palette: creams, camel, honey wood, soft terracotta accents

visual_families.lighting: clear daylight with crisp shadow definition
visual_families.palette: soft white, black accents, stone, pale oak

visual_families.mood: collected, natural, relaxed and lived-in styling
visual_families.palette: linen, muted greens, walnut, handmade ceramic tones

inspiration.visual_language: aspirational, mood-led, layered, and magazine-worthy without feeling staged for ecommerce
inspiration.hero_emphasis: lead with atmosphere, a strong focal statement, and an emotionally legible room mood
inspiration.section_emphasis: show visually distinct styling directions rather than repeating the same setup

implementation.visual_language: clear, practical, legible, and grounded in real-room execution
implementation.hero_emphasis: make the setup readable and believable, with practical room cues that help the viewer understand the process
implementation.section_emphasis: prioritize useful focal clarity, sequence, and decision points

problem_solving.visual_language: corrective, practical, and specific while still attractive enough for editorial use
problem_solving.hero_emphasis: show a convincing room that makes the fix or correction feel tangible
problem_solving.section_emphasis: focus on problem areas, corrections, and proportion or material adjustments
composition_styles: before-and-after style framing without literal split screens

comparison.visual_language: criteria-led, option-aware, and polished enough to support recommendation content
comparison.hero_emphasis: show a strong option category clearly, with a refined but useful editorial feel
comparison.section_emphasis: differentiate option types, materials, or use cases visually

decision_making.visual_language: constraint-aware, reassuring, and practical with enough beauty to stay pin-worthy
decision_making.hero_emphasis: show a room scenario that makes the decision context easy to understand
decision_making.section_emphasis: highlight tradeoffs around size, budget, fit, and style context
